mapper.sql: id, credential_code, credential_type, secret_ciphertext, secret_mask, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from source_credentials order by updated_at desc, id desc

insert into source_credentials ( credential_code, credential_type, secret_ciphertext, secret_mask, enabled, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{credential.credentialCode}, #{credential.credentialType}, #{credential.secretCiphertext}, #{credential.secretMask}, #{credential.enabled}, #{credential.createdBy}, #{credential.updatedBy} ) returning id
mapper.update: update source_credentials set credential_code = #{credential.credentialCode}, credential_type = #{credential.credentialType}, secret_ciphertext = #{credential.secretCiphertext}, secret_mask = #{credential.secretMask}, enabled = #{credential.enabled}, updated_by = #{credential.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{credential.id}
